title: XPeng to Report Q1 2024 Earnings: Record Deliveries and Margin Expansion
text: XPeng reported Q1 2024 earnings showing a 20% year-over-year increase in deliveries of Smart EVs with 21,821 units delivered. The gross margin expanded significantly to 12.9% in Q1 2024, doubling from the previous quarter. XPeng plans to maintain a mid to low-teen margin for gross profit by the end of 2024 and expects to launch different car models quarterly from Q3 onwards. XPeng aims to open about 600 stores by Q3 and launch a powerful and price-appropriate MONA product in the A-class sedan segment. The company held an earnings call on May 21 at 8 pm Beijing Time (8 am US Eastern Time), providing management commentary on the quarter's results and forward-looking guidance.
